title: iris albomarginata
intro: Iris albomarginata, also known as the white-edged iris, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the iris family, characterized by its white-edged, blue-violet flowers. Traditionally, Iris albomarginata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Iris albomarginata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
